prestazioni: Engine: 6.0L W12 TSI (CW12) with upgraded Garrett GTW4508R turbochargers (1.4 bar boost), custom billet compressor wheels, and TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegates for sustained 850 hp and 950 Nm torque on E85 fuel. Forged internals include Mahle Motorsport pistons, Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft with upgraded main bearings from ACL Race Series.

Suspension: Öhlins TTX46 coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping, 100mm extended travel, and reinforced spherical bearings. Custom-fabricated subframe reinforcements by KW Suspensions with adjustable camber plates and polybushings from SuperPro for articulation. Front and rear sway bars upgraded to Eibach Pro-Street Sway Bars (28mm front, 25mm rear) with adjustable end links.

Drivetrain: Quaife ATB differentials (front and rear) with 40% lockup under load, paired with a reinforced ZF 8HP95X transmission tuned by APR for 150ms shift times. Custom driveshafts from GKN Driveline with CV joints rated for 1,200 Nm torque. Transfer case upgraded to a Magna PT-D4800 with a 4.0:1 low-range gearset and reinforced output shafts.
estetica: Body: Full carbon fiber widebody kit by Liberty Walk (LB-WORKS) with extended fenders (50mm front, 70mm rear), custom rally-style front splitter, and a rear diffuser with integrated tow hooks. Carbon fiber hood with functional vents for turbo cooling, fabricated by AutoCarbon.

Lighting: Rigid Industries D-Series Pro LED light bars (50-inch front, 30-inch rear) with amber fog covers, integrated into a custom aluminum roof rack by Front Runner Outfitters. Baja Designs Squadron Pro auxiliary lights mounted on the front bumper with a custom wiring harness by Painless Performance.

Interior: Full Sparco Evo II racing seats with 6-point harnesses (Schroth Profi II), bolted to a custom roll cage by Safety Devices. Alcantara-wrapped dashboard with carbon fiber trim by V Carbon, and a Motec C127 dash display replacing the stock cluster. Custom center console with integrated fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360) and a long-range fuel cell (ATL 120L) in the rear cargo area.
